label: Quantization-aware training & low-precision adaptation

node.label: Quantization-aware training & low-precision adaptation
node.definition: Quantization-aware training and low-precision adaptation expose a model to restricted numeric formats during optimization so deployment error is reduced.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Quantization-aware training & low-precision adaptation is to connect Scalars, vectors, matrices & tensors, Numerical analysis to downstream capabilities including Quantized inference & compressed deployment.
examples: substrate for Quantized inference & compressed deployment
combined with Scalars, vectors, matrices & tensors
limitations: Results are sensitive to data quality, hyperparameters, compute budget, random variation, and evaluation contamination. Its direct dependencies include Scalars, vectors, matrices & tensors, Numerical analysis.
